summary: KOLO Dark Mode UI Corrections - All 6 features verified. AI follow-up button gradient correct (#E82EA4 → #8A2BE2), Source dropdown removed from QuickAddProspectModal, texts readable in dark mode (expanded tasks and creation modal), 'Ajouter prospect' button removed from Prospects header, only search icon remains.

issues: Dead code: Source dropdown still exists in ProspectsTab showAddForm but this form is no longer accessible since the button was removed. Consider removing this dead code for cleaner codebase.

ai_followup_button_gradient: Button 'Générer une relance IA' has correct gradient in dark mode
Button visible in expanded overdue tasks
source_dropdown_removed: QuickAddProspectModal (+ button) has NO Source field
Only fields: Full name, Phone, Email, Project description
Modal accessible via center + button in bottom nav
expanded_task_text_readability: Task title readable: c('muted') provides gray color
Date/time info visible with c('muted') color
creation_modal_labels_readability: All labels readable: Full name, Phone, Email, Project description
add_prospect_button_removed: Prospects tab header has NO 'Ajouter prospect' button
Only search toggle button (magnifying glass) present
search_icon_in_prospects_header: Search icon (magnifying glass) visible in header

critical_code_review_comments: Dead code in ProspectsTab: showAddForm and related Source dropdown (lines 1806-1937) - not accessible since setShowAddForm(true) is never called. Consider cleanup.
AI button gradient correctly uses c() helper with isDark conditional: isDark ? 'linear-gradient(135deg, #E82EA4 0%, #8A2BE2 100%)' : 'linear-gradient(135deg, #7C3AED 0%, #EC4899 100%)'
Labels in QuickAddProspectModal use c('muted') which correctly resolves to #A0A4AE in dark mode
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode UI corrections fully verified. The ProspectsTab has dead code (showAddForm with Source dropdown) that could be cleaned up but doesn't affect functionality. All text is readable in dark mode using the theme color helper c() function.
